name: Seoul
note: Incheon Intl — coastal island, 48km W of city, 1-3°C cooler (UHI)

name: Tokyo
note: Haneda — Tokyo Bay coastal, 14km S of city

name: Paris
note: CDG — suburban/rural, 25km NE, 1-2°C cooler than city

name: London
note: London City — urban docklands, 11km E, minimal offset

name: NYC
note: LaGuardia — waterfront, 13km from Manhattan, maritime moderation

name: Chicago
note: O'Hare — NW suburbs, 27km from Loop (Polymarket uses KORD not KMDW)

name: Toronto
note: Pearson — 22km NW, suburban, higher elev than lakefront

name: Madrid
note: Barajas — 12km NE, elevated plateau 609m, similar to city

name: Singapore
note: Changi — coastal eastern tip, 17km E, sea breeze influence

name: Miami
note: Miami Intl — 13km NW of downtown, subtropical

name: Buenos Aires
note: Ezeiza — 35km SW, semi-rural, 1-2°C cooler than city

name: Taipei
note: Taoyuan — 40km SW of Taipei city, coastal plain, different microclimate
